heading: NAVAL PETROLEUM RESERVES
label: 869 NAVAL PETROLEUM RESERVES
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 869, consisting of sections 8961 to 8966, related to retired grade for members of the Air Force, prior to renumbering as chapter 943 of this title.
